title: Better Wandering Traders
description: A datapack that improves the trades of wandering traders
body:
# Better Wandering Traders
This is a datapack that has been inspired by [Better Wandering Traders [FABRIC]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-wandering-traders).

**This datapack requires the [VillagerConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagerconfig) mod to work!**

![better wandering traders overview](https://i.imgur.com/wu6qEKt.png)
